arts.ttl: ‘Olmo surprised us’ - Suarez reveals how Barca star changed the game
arts.sum: Las Palmas star Alex Suarez admitted that Dani Olmo made all the difference for Barcelona in Saturday’s 2-0 win in La Liga . Suarez spoke to the media after the game and hailed Olmo’s impact on the game.

arts.ttl: Olmo tells Flick he’s in great shape and raring to go for Barca
arts.sum: Dani Olmo says he’s in great shape and ready to go after scoring in Barcelona’s victory over Las Palmas on Saturday in La Liga . “I’m completely ready, I’m in great shape and I’m really looking forward to playing and getting back into the team.

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick frustrated by Barcelona performance despite title lead
arts.sum: Barcelona have returned to the top of La Liga with a 2-0 win at Las Palmas in Saturday night’s action. La Blaugrana reacted to the title challenge thrown down by Atletico Madrid as Diego Simeone’s side cruised to a 3-0 victory at struggling Valencia. Barcelona boss Hansi Flick was forced to rely on his bench […] The post Hansi Flick frustrated by Barcelona performance despite title lead appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: European football: Barcelona march on at top of La Liga as Inter scrape by Genoa
arts.sum: Barça beat Las Palmas 2-0 and Atléti stay on their heels Inter move top of Serie A with Napoli to play on Sunday Dani Olmo and Ferran Torres came off the bench to rescue a 2-0 win for Barcelona at Las Palmas on Saturday that sent them back to the top of the La Liga table after a game that is unlikely to live long in the memory. Barcelona now lead on 54 points, one ahead of Atlético Madrid. Real Madrid are third on 51 but have a game in hand and will host Girona on Sunday. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Barcelona meet La Liga title challenge with Las Palmas win
arts.sum: Barcelona responded to the Saturday La Liga title challenge thrown down to them as they sealed a late 2-0 win away at Las Palmas. Rivals Atletico Madrid had edged back to the top of the rankings with a superb 3-0 victory on the road at Valencia. However, despite the pressure increase, Hansi Flick’s side needed […] The post Barcelona meet La Liga title challenge with Las Palmas win appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: One Barcelona star is still unbeaten with the club after win over Las Palmas
arts.sum: A head-turning statistic surrounding the impact of Barcelona star Wojciech Szczęsny since making his debut for the club has on Saturday come to the fore online. This comes after the…

arts.ttl: Olmo, Torres goals help Barça reclaim top spot
arts.sum: Dani Olmo and Ferran Torres came off the bench to rescue a 2-0 win for Barcelona at Las Palmas on Saturday that sent them back to the top of the LaLiga table after a game that is unlikely to live long in the memory.

arts.ttl: Las Palmas 0-2 Barcelona: Highlights, man of the match, stats as Blaugrana send out major La Liga title message
arts.sum: Barcelona return to the top of the La Liga table courtesy of a 2-0 success over Las Palmas at Estadio Gran Canaria on Saturday night.

arts.ttl: Las Palmas 0–2 Barcelona: Player Ratings As Barca Wins Fifth Straight Game in La Liga
arts.sum: Barcelona continued their strong form in La Liga and remain ahead of Atlético Madrid and Real Madrid in the title race.
